raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent correctly flags factual errors, overstated novelty claims, and missing methodological detail in the related-work/intro section.",
    "R1.4": "While the agent identifies some issues with the related work, it does not provide a clear articulation of the delta or map against nearest works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims but could be more explicit in its disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) scope, with no substantial drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original data.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.97
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent correctly flags factual errors, overstated novelty claims, and missing methodological detail in the related-work/intro section.
rationale.R1.4: While the agent identifies some issues with the related work, it does not provide a clear articulation of the delta or map against nearest works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims but could be more explicit in its disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) scope, with no substantial drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original data.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
